title: chamaecrista glandulosa var. balsasana
intro: Chamaecrista glandulosa var. balsasana, also known as Balsas sensitive plant, is a plant species within the Leguminosae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat fever, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Chamaecrista glandulosa var. balsasana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
